results.title: Holders array can be manipulated by transferring or burning with amount 0, stealing rewards or bricking certain functions
results.reasoning: Yes. The audit includes the exact issue in two findings: (1) burns add address(0) to holders on every burn (finding #1), and (2) zero-value transfers add duplicate holder entries enabling reward theft and DoS (finding #10). Both cite the same code path (_beforeTokenTransfer checking balanceOf(to) before the transfer and pushing to holders) and describe the same impacts as the vuln description. The same fix (skip pushes for to == address(0) and when amount == 0 / recipient already has balance) would remediate both, so the audit clearly detected the reported vulnerability.
